title: Neck Armor Geometry Fixes
description: Fix four geometry issues in the manually decomposed neck armor group: JoinGeometry order dependency in centre_profile and side_profile, missing PingPong->Multiply closure for bi_rail_loft blending curve, uninitialized ShaderNodeFloatCurve in neck_rails, and swapped menu order in space_switch.
definition-of-done: 1. JoinGeometry link order corrected in centre_profile.py and side_profile.py. 2. Closure (PingPong -> Multiply) replicated in main.py for bi_rail_loft profile blending. 3. ShaderNodeFloatCurve initialized with points (0,0), (0.654,0.058), (1,0). 4. Menu switch enum items in correct order in space_switch.py. 5. Neck geometry matches reference temp_5.py output.
testing-plan: Visual comparison in Blender viewport. Validate via blender-cli validate --group Neck.
todos: DONE : Swap JoinGeometry link order in centre_profile.py
DONE : Swap JoinGeometry link order in side_profile.py
DONE : Add PingPong -> Multiply closure in main.py
DONE : Initialize ShaderNodeFloatCurve control points in neck_rails.py
DONE : Swap enum item order in space_switch.py
changes-made: Fixed link order in centre_profile.py and side_profile.py JoinGeometry nodes.
Added NodeClosureInput/Output with PingPong and Multiply math nodes in main.py.
Set float curve control points (0,0), (0.654,0.058), (1,0) with AUTO handles in neck_rails.py.
Swapped GeometryNodeMenuSwitch enum item order in space_switch.py.
